employment: I'm working on agentic data security at Teleskope.

projects.title: Artificial Taste
projects.sentence: Outside of work, I'm finishing Artificial Taste: BuzzFeed for LLMs, or a quiz to see what model your taste most naturally maps to.

projects.title: Superforecaster
projects.sentence: I'm also building Superforecaster, an auditable research harness for making and grading probabilistic forecasts with AI.
